gui.better_lore.title: Lore
gui.better_lore.help.name: You can use the same QuickText tags in both item names and lore.
gui.better_lore.help.color_intro: Use QuickText color tags to show text in one color.
gui.better_lore.help.gradient_intro: Use QuickText gradient tags to blend between colors.
gui.better_lore.help.nesting_intro: Nested tags must close from inside to outside.
gui.better_lore.help.nesting_right_gradi: Keep gradient tags inside formatting tags when combining them.
gui.better_lore.help.colors: Insert color uses the selected color, gradient uses Color 1 then Color 2.
gui.better_lore.help.sliders: Drag RGB sliders, use < and >, or paste/type 0-255 while a slider is focused.
gui.better_lore.help.slider_keys: Click the color square for a wheel, or type/paste #rrggbb in the hex box.
